backend/main.mo: Entry point for the Motoko backend actor that includes blob storage functionality via a MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three image-related features for MenuSection: replacing chicken taco images and restoring salsa/chips and quesadilla images, each mapped to specific files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a reference for the project's component structure and asset usage.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a scroll-to-contact CTA for the Phoenix metro area.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying Jasmine Cota's info card with a clickable phone number, service area, availability hours, and a call-to-action button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a logo, tagline, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu that hides on scroll-down and shows on scroll-up using the useScrollDirection hook.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, business name, tagline, and CTA buttons to scroll to the menu or contact sections.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, burritos, quesadillas, etc.) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, badges, and optional protein choice labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated or anonymous identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, used for a static frontend website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a Mexican-inspired warm color palette (light and dark modes), and utility classes for typography, gradients, and textures.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Dancing Script, Montserrat), an extended OKLCH-based color palette (gold, cream, chili, sienna, verde, etc.), border radius, and box shadow tokens. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' restaurant website project, listing known issues (incorrect chicken taco images, missing chips/salsa and quesadilla images), existing fix features, and a pending request to retain the new catering section banner image.
